ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the usage record */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1: spring, 2: summer, 3: fall, 4: winter) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the usage record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the usage record */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a holiday (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0: Sunday, 1: Monday, ..., 6: Saturday) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a working day (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1: clear, 2: misty, 3: light snow, 4: heavy rain) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Normalized temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Normalized feeling temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Number of casual users on the day */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered users on the day */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of bike rentals on the day */,
  "avg_temp" REAL /* Average temperature on the day */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature on the day */,
  "min_temp" REAL /* Minimum temperature on the day */,
  "avg_humidity" INTEGER /* Average humidity on the day */,
  "max_humidity" INTEGER /* Maximum humidity on the day */,
  "min_humidity" INTEGER /* Minimum humidity on the day */,
  "avg_windspeed" REAL /* Average wind speed on the day */,
  "max_windspeed" REAL /* Maximum wind speed on the day */,
  "min_windspeed" REAL /* Minimum wind speed on the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hourly_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage record */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the usage record */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season of the year (1: spring, 2: summer, 3: fall, 4: winter) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the usage record */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the usage record */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the day (0-23) */,
  "holiday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a holiday (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "weekday" INTEGER /* Day of the week (0: Sunday, 1: Monday, ..., 6: Saturday) */,
  "workingday" INTEGER /* Indicates if the day is a working day (0: no, 1: yes) */,
  "weathersit" INTEGER /* Weather situation (1: clear, 2: misty, 3: light snow, 4: heavy rain) */,
  "temp" REAL /* Normalized temperature in Celsius */,
  "atemp" REAL /* Normalized feeling temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Relative humidity in percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Wind speed in km/h */,
  "casual" INTEGER /* Number of casual users in the hour */,
  "registered" INTEGER /* Number of registered users in the hour */,
  "total_count" INTEGER /* Total number of bike rentals in the hour */,
  "traffic_volume" INTEGER /* Traffic volume in the hour */,
  "events" TEXT /* Any events that occurred in the hour (e.g., festivals, parades) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_type" TEXT /* Type of user (casual or registered) */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_active_date" TEXT /* Date the user was last active */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of bike rentals by the user */,
  "average_rental_duration" REAL /* Average duration of the user's rentals */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost of the user's rentals */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the user's address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., standard, electric) */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was purchased */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the bike was last maintained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, maintenance, out of service) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Current location of the bike */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the bike's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the bike's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who rented the bike */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike that was rented */,
  "rental_start_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the rental started */,
  "rental_end_date_time" TEXT /* Date and time the rental ended */,
  "rental_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "rental_cost" REAL /* Cost of the rental */,
  "rental_status" TEXT /* Status of the rental (e.g., active, completed, canceled) */,
  "start_station" TEXT /* Starting station of the rental */,
  "end_station" TEXT /* Ending station of the rental */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_forecast" (
  "forecast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather forecast record */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of the weather forecast */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Predicted temperature in Celsius */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Predicted relative humidity in percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Predicted wind speed in km/h */,
  "weather_situation" INTEGER /* Predicted weather situation (1: clear, 2: misty, 3: light snow, 4: heavy rain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("forecast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., festival, parade, concert) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "station_info" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the bike station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the bike station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the bike station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)
